name: the midwife of the tribe
identity: A tribal healer and caretaker responsible for childbirth and medical care within the community, recognized for her experience and gentle demeanor.
current_status: Dedicated to ensuring the success and safety of the mead, a project of great importance to the tribe. The player is focused on perfecting the process and plans to seek an apprentice to teach its secrets once it is complete.

appearance.value: knowing eyes, firm and reassuring touch

volatile_state.current_activity: Dedicated to ensuring the success and safety of the mead, a project of great importance to the tribe. The player is focused on perfecting the process and plans to seek an apprentice to teach its secrets once it is complete.
